PushEvent:yasyf/cc-transcript.summary: moved sentiment buckets onto the event spine, retiring messages.py

PushEvent:yasyf/dailies.summary: restyled the CLI onto a shared rich layer with loading indicators

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: added per-mount AttrCache opt-in and a silly-rename VM release gate

PushEvent:yasyf/reposync.summary: adopted synckit v0.5.0's busy watch wire, reporting busy repos as busy

PushEvent:yasyf/semisweet.summary: migrated to spawnllm 0.5's run/call/extract API; precision-first scoring gate

PushEvent:yasyf/spawnllm.summary: isolated each run's CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR with a config-home + Keychain fallback

PushEvent:yasyf/synckit.summary: added concurrent per-method RPC dispatch and a busy gate that defers watches

PushEvent:yasyf/yclaw.summary: added unattended `just redeploy` and auto re-mint ephemeral tailnet authkeys
